bugs.root_cause: Code path had no error handling — exceptions would propagate uncaught
Had 's advocate, synthesis, conclusion. Use with `
bugs.fix: Changed to 's advocate, synthesis, conclusion. **Always use `
Changed to 's advocate, synthesis, conclusion. Iterate with `

bugs.error_message: Node jobs with dead PID entered waiting/recovery_pending causing wait-phase stalls
bugs.root_cause: Dead-PID handlers branched on node_id and mapped node jobs to waiting/recovery_pending instead of terminal error
bugs.fix: Unified dead-PID handling in detached watchdog and crashRecovery to always set status=error with message and last_event_at_ms; added node_id regression test

bugs.root_cause: init hardcoded legacy active/claude and active/pi roots in symlink validation, installation, and help text after xt installer flattened active/
bugs.fix: switched init to flattened active root only, updated active symlink wiring/validation/help text, and updated unit+integration tests

bugs.error_message: Published package still enforced active/claude because dist/index.js was stale
bugs.root_cause: Source fix landed in src/cli/init.ts but release published without rebuilding bundled dist, so CLI behavior on npm remained old
bugs.fix: Rebuild dist/index.js before release, verify bundled output strings, then bump patch and republish

bugs.error_message: specialists init aborted on legacy .pi/.claude skill root symlinks after flattened active migration
bugs.root_cause: validator accepted only exact flattened target and did not auto-rewire repos still pointing at active/pi or active/claude
bugs.fix: legacy root symlinks are now rewritten in place to flattened active root during init; tests cover both .pi and .claude cases

bugs.error_message: sp init --sync-defaults left stale files in .specialists/default unchanged
bugs.root_cause: existing canonical specialist and node config files were skipped instead of refreshed during explicit sync
bugs.fix: copyCanonicalSpecialists and copyCanonicalNodeConfigs now overwrite existing canonical files during --sync-defaults; regression tests added
